title: Fable 5 Returns... This Is Big
summary: A video commentary claims that Fable 5, previously pulled over national security concerns, may be returning based on leaked Claude code strings and Amazon Bedrock listings. The piece argues the pulldown accelerated Anthropic's development and that a stronger Mythos successor is already trained, with Congress demanding transparency on export controls.
writeup: The video commentary claims Fable 5, a model previously pulled over national security concerns, may be returning, citing leaked Claude code strings and Amazon Bedrock listings as evidence. It argues the pulldown accelerated Anthropic's development, with a stronger Mythos successor said to already be trained. The piece ties this to Congressional demands for transparency on export controls, situating the claim within frontier AI security debates.
